title: Quiz NPC Implementation Guide for QuiztalWorld
description: A comprehensive guide for AI assistants to add new quiz NPCs to the QuiztalWorld game

implementation_steps.title: Create NPC Class File
implementation_steps.description: Create a new TypeScript file for the NPC

class_structure.constructor_parameters: scene: Phaser.Scene, x: number, y: number

key_points: NPC class must extend QuizNPC base class
Texture key should match the spritesheet key in GameScene

implementation_steps.title: Create Quiz Data File
implementation_steps.description: Create a JSON file containing quiz questions for the NPC
requirements: Each question must have exactly 3 options
Answer must match one of the options exactly
Minimum 25-30 questions recommended for comprehensive coverage
Questions should cover basic to advanced topics in the NPC's theme
Avoid repetitive questions to prevent player boredom

implementation_steps.title: Update NPCQuizManager
implementation_steps.description: Add the new NPC to the quiz manager's loading list

implementation_steps.title: Add Assets to GameScene Preload
implementation_steps.description: Load NPC textures and avatar in the GameScene preload method
implementation_steps.texture_naming: Use consistent naming: texture_key should match what's used in NPC constructor

implementation_steps.title: Add Import to GameScene
implementation_steps.description: Import the new NPC class in GameScene

implementation_steps.title: Add Property Declaration
implementation_steps.description: Declare the NPC property in GameScene class

implementation_steps.title: Instantiate NPC in GameScene
implementation_steps.description: Create NPC instance in the GameScene create method

implementation_steps.title: Add Physics Collider
implementation_steps.description: Add collision detection between player and NPC

implementation_steps.title: Add to Interaction Trigger System
implementation_steps.description: Add NPC to the handleNPCTrigger method

walking_npc_implementation.description: Guide for creating walking NPCs using the simple patrol behavior
implementation_steps: 1. Create a new class that extends WalkingNPC
2. Define patrol points (Point A and Point B) in the NPC constructor
3. Instantiate SimplePatrolBehavior with the patrol points
4. Set the behavior using setBehavior() method
5. Configure animations for walk and idle states in each direction
6. Register the NPC with WalkingNPCManager in GameScene
current_implementations: MrRugPull - Converted to use walking behavior with simple patrol between two points
benefits: Simplicity: No complex pathfinding or collision detection required
Predictability: NPCs follow a consistent, predictable path
Ease of Use: Simple configuration with just two points
limitations: No Obstacle Avoidance: NPCs will move through walls or obstacles
Fixed Path: Movement is limited to straight lines between two points
No Dynamic Targets: Points are fixed at initialization time

common_issues.cause: Mismatch between texture key in code and spritesheet key
common_issues.solution: Ensure texture key in NPC constructor matches the key used in GameScene.preload

common_issues.cause: Incorrect frame count or texture key in createAnimations
common_issues.solution: Verify spritesheet has 24 frames and texture key matches loaded spritesheet

common_issues.cause: Missing collision detection or trigger system registration
common_issues.solution: Ensure NPC is added to physics colliders and handleNPCTrigger method

common_issues.cause: NPC ID not added to NPCQuizManager or JSON file issues
common_issues.solution: Add NPC ID to loadAllQuizData array and validate JSON structure

validation_checklist: ✅ Quiz JSON file has exactly 3 options per question
✅ Quiz has 25-30+ comprehensive questions covering the theme
✅ NPC added to NPCQuizManager npcIds array
✅ NPC imported and property declared in GameScene
best_practices: Use consistent naming conventions across all files
Test texture loading before implementing full NPC logic
Create comprehensive question sets (25-30+ questions) to prevent repetition
Cover topics from basic to advanced levels within the NPC's theme
Keep quiz questions focused on the NPC's theme
Use appropriate colors and styling for the NPC's personality
Include both online and offline message variants
Follow the reward system specification (0.01-0.5 Quiztals)
Implement proper cooldown and anti-spam mechanisms

file_dependencies.description: Files that need to be modified when adding a new NPC
